title: AppShell — manifest-driven desktop + mobile shell
description: Generic, brand-free OS-style shell framework. One <AppShell manifest> wrapper provider gives a project a macOS-style window manager AND an iOS-style mobile surface, driven entirely by a manifest (brand, apps, features, surface regions, capabilities, persistence, keymap). Features (search, settings, widgets, control-center, inspector, notifications) plug in via extension points. Responsiveness is a single provider + shared primitives. Imports no apps or brand strings — the consumer injects everything.
